text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Manhattan Cafe! It's Manhattan Cafe! She's past the finish line, but even now her gaze lingers on the horizon!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Where in the world is she heading?! And just how
strong will she become?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I couldn't catch up. You really... stood your ground out there...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't sit well with me. The way you act like no
one else is a threat. Not even me, when I'm hot on
your tail.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But well, I guess it's mutual. I won't catch up to
you by running in the same direction.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're far ahead in the distance... but that's
precisely what makes pursuing you worth it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll suspend the experiment here. As of this
moment, there is no Plan A or Plan B. I will
combine them both...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: To begin a new plan entirely. It will be "Plan C."

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Plan... C.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the plans will merge like a double
helix—influencing and accelerating each other.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I would like you to join me, Cafe. Join me and
participate in this grand experiment.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um... I'll... consider it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe doesn't come to the winner's
circle. Instead, she stands perfectly still, gazing
off beyond the track.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: She's gone now... My friend. That was your fault.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess I must've scared Manhattan Cafe's friend
off just now. I go to apologize when—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's... not what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's your fault... my friend got so fast that... I can't
keep up with her. That's what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes... She evolves...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The higher I set my standards, the faster she
gets...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The more obstacles I overcome... the further away
she gets. Always beckoning me closer, telling me I
can go further.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If I'd been alone, I probably would have reached
her by now... And that's where it would've ended.
But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Even now... I'm still looking up at the sky. I tilt my
head further and further back, but the tops of the
skyscrapers remain out of sight...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And it's because you... lifted my friend higher.
Because you... lifted me higher.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Higher and higher... beyond my reach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What is the truth behind her friend? I finally feel
like I'm standing at the doorway to
understanding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's neither good nor evil. Because...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She's only going to get faster, isn't she? ...My
friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And we can keep on chasing after her, can't we?
Together...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: She is no longer just my friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We've both seen her, in our mind's eye... so I want
us to chase her together, no matter where it takes
us.
choice_data_list: I'll chase her with you... I promise.
I'll chase her with you... I promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Side by side, we look up at the sky together...
reflecting on how precious it is to have a limitless
goal.
